engineering.title: Tailored Engineering for Rwanda’s Needs
engineering.description: We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all. Our engineering team offers flexible product customization and solution design services specifically tailored to Rwanda’s grid standards and climatic conditions.

installation.title: Seamless Installation & Setup Support
installation.description: Transitioning to solar should be stress-free. We provide comprehensive sales support and technical guidance to ensure your systems are installed correctly and safely for long-term performance.

support.title: Local Technical Support & Guarantee
support.description: Your partnership with Ruichu Solar doesn't end at delivery. We have established a robust service system providing timely and professional technical support and after-sales guarantees.

biz_hub.title: Business Growth via Rwanda Biz Hub
biz_hub.description: For large-scale projects and investors, we provide integrated business support. From company registration to investment consulting, we help you navigate the Rwandan market while providing the hardware to power your growth.

header.subtitle: Have a project in mind or need technical advice? Our local team in Kigali is ready to power your transition to sustainable energy.

experts.description: We believe in the power of face-to-face partnership. Our dedicated local staff in Kigali is available for in-person consultations to discuss your specific energy needs, site assessments, and business investment opportunities through Rwanda Biz Hub.

hero.title: Empowering Rwanda with Sustainable Innovation
hero.subtitle: We are dedicated to accelerating the global adoption of clean energy through safe, efficient, and intelligent green power solutions.

heritage.title: A Global Leader in Energy Storage
heritage.p1: Ruichu Solar Rwanda is the local partner of Shaoxing Ruichu Technology Co., Ltd., a global enterprise dedicated to providing high-quality, high-reliability portable power stations and energy storage systems.
heritage.p2: With years of experience in the new energy sector, we have built a robust product matrix that combines advanced technology with practical user needs. Our global insights span across Europe, the Americas, Australia, Asia, and Africa.

quality.title: R&D Strength & Certified Excellence
quality.p1: At the heart of our products is independent innovation. We operate our own production base and a professional R&D team that continuously iterates on core technologies.
quality.p2: Quality is non-negotiable; we adhere to a comprehensive assurance system from raw material procurement to finished product testing.

mission.title: Bridging Technology to the Land of a Thousand Hills
mission.p1: Our goal in Rwanda is to provide more than just hardware. We offer flexible product customization and solution design tailored specifically to the unique grid standards and climatic conditions of the region.
mission.p2: Through Rwanda Biz Hub, we provide a seamless partnership experience with full pre-sales, sales, and after-sales technical support in Kigali.

cta.title: Partner with a Global Leader
cta.subtitle: Bring world-class energy technology to your project in Rwanda. Let's build a sustainable future together.

hero.title: The Ruichu Advantage
hero.subtitle: Deeply rooted in green energy technology, we build a sustainable future together by combining world-class manufacturing with dedicated local expertise.

direct.title: Direct-Import & R&D Excellence
direct.description: By partnering directly with a leading manufacturer equipped with an independent R&D team, we ensure complete control over core technologies. You get state-of-the-art products without the middleman markup.

quality.title: Certified Global Quality
quality.description: Uncompromising quality is our standard. Our products undergo rigorous testing from raw materials to final assembly and hold major international certifications, including CE, RoHS, and UN38.3.

biz_hub.title: Rwanda Biz Hub Integration
biz_hub.description: We offer more than just products. Through our Rwanda Biz Hub, we provide a complete service system covering pre-sales consultation, custom solution design, and reliable after-sales technical support right here in Kigali.

global.title: Proven Global Track Record
global.description: With extensive experience exporting across Europe, the Americas, Australia, and Africa, we deeply understand international standards and perfectly tailor our solutions to Rwanda's specific grid and climate conditions.

solar_panels.title: Solar Panels
solar_panels.subtitle: Chinese Engineering Excellence
solar_panels.description: Our monocrystalline solar panels are sourced from top-tier Chinese manufacturers, ensuring the highest conversion rates and durability. Specifically chosen for Rwanda's varying light conditions, these panels offer peak performance from dawn until dusk.
features: High wind and snow load resistance

portable_power.title: Portable Power Stations
portable_power.subtitle: Power on the Move
portable_power.description: Versatile, high-capacity mobile power supplies for outdoor, home backup, and emergency use. Includes portable, handbag and sleeve models. These stations provide clean, silent power wherever you need it, from camping trips to critical home backup during outages.

storage_systems.title: Energy Storage Systems
storage_systems.subtitle: Energy Independence
storage_systems.description: Comprehensive residential and commercial stacked battery solutions integrated with EU/US standard inverters for maximum energy independence. Our high-voltage systems ensure seamless transition to battery power with minimal efficiency loss.
